target_expression: pri_2010_disclosure:A1 & pri_2010_disclosure:A2 & pri_2010_disclosure:A3 & pri_2010_disclosure:A4 & pri_2010_disclosure:A6 & pri_2010_disclosure:A7 & pri_2010_disclosure:A8 & pri_2010_disclosure:A9 & pri_2010_disclosure:A10 & pri_2010_disclosure:A11
notes: FOCAL 1.1 (registry covers all listed types) = AND of PRI A-series
polarity-flipped: FOCAL asks for low/no threshold, PRI asks if threshold exists

FOCAL 3.3 is a 5-condition compound (no-registration, free, open license, non-proprietary, machine-readable); PRI Q1 covers availability and Q6 covers analysis-ready format. Open-license / no-registration are not in PRI
FOCAL 4.1 (full names) finer than PRI but cross-references both name-listing rows
FOCAL 4.2 (contact details) covers all four contact-detail rows on either side
FOCAL 4.3 (legal form) on either principal-side or lobbyist-side report
FOCAL 6.1 (consultant/firm client list) ≈ PRI E2c (lobbyist report lists represented principals)
FOCAL 6.2 (sponsors / members) ≈ PRI E1j (major financial contributors)
FOCAL 7.1 (total lobbying income for consultants/firms) ≈ PRI E2f_i (lobbyist compensation)
FOCAL 7.3 (income sources + amount) finer than PRI E1j (major financial contributors)
FOCAL 7.4 (number of lobbyists) implied by PRI E1c (lobbyists listed by name)
FOCAL 7.6 (total expenditure) = AND of PRI E1f_i (comp) + E1f_ii (non-comp) + E1f_iii (other)
FOCAL 7.7 (compensated vs uncompensated) = AND of PRI E1f_i + E1f_ii
